summary: Platform Hardening Execution Tracker (Iteration 72) - Full testing of new execution tracking system with dual scores. All 18 backend tests passed. All 13 frontend tabs verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Execution tracker properly manages 10 phases across 3 sprints with 46 total tasks
Dual scoring system correctly shows Architecture Maturity (9.2/10) vs Production Readiness (0/10)
Go-Live Blockers have fix_strategy and estimated_hours for prioritization
Frontend properly integrates with all new /api/hardening/execution/* endpoints
In-memory state for execution tracker (MOCKED - not persisted to DB)
seed_data_creation: None - execution tracker uses in-memory state from execution_tracker.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Execution Tracker fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/hardening/execution/status (10 phases, 3 sprints, 6 blockers), GET /api/hardening/execution/phase/{id}, POST /api/hardening/execution/phase/{id}/start, POST /api/hardening/execution/phase/{id}/task/{task_id}/complete, POST /api/hardening/execution/blocker/{blocker_id}/resolve, GET /api/hardening/execution/certification. Updated /api/hardening/status now returns dual scores (architecture_maturity=9.2, production_readiness=calculated from task completion). Frontend has 3 new tabs: Overview (updated with dual gauges), Execution (sprint progress, blockers, expandable phases), Certification (go-live certification report).

mocked_services.Execution_tracker_state: MOCKED - phases/tasks/blockers stored in-memory, not persisted to database
mocked_services.Production_readiness_score: Calculated dynamically from task completion percentage with sprint weights

features_verified.GET_hardening_execution_status: PASS - Returns 10 phases, 3 sprints, 6 blockers, readiness scores
features_verified.GET_hardening_execution_phase: PASS - Returns phase detail with all tasks
features_verified.GET_hardening_execution_certification: PASS - Returns full go-live certification report
features_verified.Frontend_Overview_dual_scores: PASS - Shows Architecture Maturity (9.2) and Production Readiness (0.25) gauges
features_verified.Frontend_Execution_tab: PASS - Sprint progress, blockers with Resolve buttons, expandable phases
features_verified.Frontend_Certification_tab: PASS - Shows NOT CERTIFIED status, gap to target, architecture breakdown
features_verified.Frontend_all_existing_tabs: PASS - Traffic, Workers, Observability, Performance, Tenants, Secrets, Playbooks, Scaling, DR, Checklist all working
features_verified.Auth_required: PASS - All execution endpoints return 401 without authentication
